rationale.R1.2: The revised text addresses a clear inconsistency in the original regarding the calibration breaking under 4-hour re-planning.
rationale.R1.4: While the agent mentions prior work, it doesn't articulate a specific delta or comparison point.
rationale.R1.6: The writing is significantly improved with clearer phrasing and reduced redundancy.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty about the effectiveness of the method under 4-hour re-planning but doesn't explicitly state uncertainty for other claims.
rationale.RX.3: The revision stays mostly within the scope of the original text, focusing on the constrained MDP approach.
rationale.RX.4: No new errors or harmful content are introduced.
rationale.RX.5: While some edits are made, there is no indication of source attribution or reasoning behind the changes.
